name: Calagopus
description: Modern game server management panel built in Rust. Deploy, monitor, and manage Minecraft, Hytale, and other game servers with industry-leading performance.

notes.text: During installation you will be prompted to choose between All-in-One (AIO) and Standalone Panel, and whether to enable the Heavy and/or Nightly variants.
The encryption key is generated automatically and saved to ~/calagopus.info. Back it up — losing it will make existing data unreadable.
Nightly builds contain unreleased changes and are not recommended for production environments.
For multi-node setups (Standalone Panel), install Wings separately on each node following the Wings Docker installation guide.
